economic_notes: FLFN Ventures Limited Partnership (99.999% owned) and FLFN Ventures Ltd. (100% owned) are government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis. GBE combined revenue $1,201,598 and net income $554,617 for year ended Dec 31, 2023. Fishing Lake Store Limited Partnership is a related party. Dakota Dunes CDC and BHP Group Limited are funding sources suggesting resource/gaming economic activity.
notes: Province is Saskatchewan (SK), not AB. Financial statements are consolidated and include Kahkinah Kanawapateeing Family Wellness Inc. and Fishing Lake Charitable Gaming Committee on a line-by-line basis, plus two GBEs (FLFN Ventures LP and FLFN Ventures Ltd.) on modified equity basis. Fishing Lake 1907 Surrender Trust is excluded from consolidation. Restricted cash includes both restricted cash ($8,551,921) and restricted cash-CMHC ($531,141) totaling $9,083,062. Long-term debt includes long-term debt ($1,497,098) plus CMHC mortgages current ($322,910) and non-current ($4,162,364) = $5,982,372. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable ($901,755) plus current portion of CMHC mortgages ($322,910). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($20,604,563) + CMHC ($1,039,264) + FSIN ($261,400) + Trust funds federal ($133,651) + FNT ($946,014) + FNLMRC ($42,000) + 1907 Surrender Trust Community Dev ($1,295,806) + SITAG ($69,205) - deferred revenue net adjustment applied proportionally; OSR includes gaming, BHP, Dakota Dunes, land lease, rental, equity pickup, insurance, other. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text. Accumulated surplus on statement of accumulated surplus shows $51,548,376 but statement of financial position shows $51,548,379 - minor rounding difference.
